# Class: FilesystemAccessor

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/result/filesystem.ts:12](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/result/filesystem.ts#L12)

Read-only accessor for the whole temporary working directory used by a
command spec.

Assertions go through `expect()` (async — they walk the disk):
`await expect(result.filesystem).toMatch('scaffolded')` compares the
tree against the fixture directory `expected/<name>/`.

## Constructors

### Constructor

```ts
new FilesystemAccessor(
   cwd, 
   testDir, 
   captures?): FilesystemAccessor;
```
